home.headline3: Only eligibility is shared with insurers.
home.description: Your raw genetic data is analyzed inside a Trusted Execution Environment and immediately purged. Prove eligibility without revealing scores via Noir ZKP, and pay privately with Confidential Intents.
home.connectPrompt: Connect your NEAR Testnet wallet to begin

tee.label: TEE
tee.title: TEE Privacy Analysis
tee.desc: Genetic data is processed only inside IronClaw TEE and purged immediately after analysis.

zkp.label: ZKP
zkp.title: Noir ZKP Credential
zkp.desc: Prove insurance eligibility with zero-knowledge proof without exposing your genetic scores.

ci.label: CI
ci.title: Confidential Intents Payment
ci.desc: Pay premiums privately via NEAR Confidential Intents. Transaction details are visible only to the parties involved.

home.footer: Powered by NEAR Protocol — IronClaw TEE · Confidential Intents · Chain Signatures

upload.title: Upload Genetic File
upload.description: Your file is never sent to the server. Only a hash is computed in the browser, then the original is analyzed inside TEE.
upload.supportedFormats: Supported formats: GenTok(.txt), VCF(.vcf), CSV(.csv), PDF(.pdf)

analysis.title: TEE Analysis in Progress
analysis.description: Your genetic data is being analyzed inside the IronClaw Trusted Execution Environment. The original data will be purged immediately after analysis.

dashboard.title: Personalized Insurance Recommendations
dashboard.description: Based on TEE analysis results, we matched the best insurance products for you. Your original genetic scores have been purged.
dashboard.selectPrompt: Please select at least one product

checkout.title: Confirm Payment
checkout.description: Sign a real Testnet transaction with your NEAR wallet. Your original genetic data has already been purged.
checkout.ethInsufficientBalance: Insufficient balance. Please fund this address via Sepolia Faucet.
checkout.toastEthDeriveError: Failed to derive ETH address. Please try again.

intentPanel.privateNote: Fields marked [PRIVATE] are not disclosed to the insurer.

success.title: Insurance Enrollment Complete
success.subtitle: This transaction was processed on NEAR Testnet.
success.demoNotice: This certificate is a demo artifact for the hackathon and does not constitute a real insurance contract.

checkout.toastWalletError: Wallet not initialized. Please refresh and try again.

fileUpload.dropzone: Drag & drop or click to select a file
fileUpload.validationPassed: File validated — ready to start analysis

steps.zkpDesc: Creating eligibility credential without exposing scores
steps.purgeDesc: Original genetic data has been securely destroyed

teeProgress.zkpBadge: Credential generated — scores are not shared with insurers
teeProgress.doneMessage: Analysis complete. Review the log above and proceed to dashboard.
